title: Inbound Update{Note}: refresh remote_posts, emit streaming event
description:
Handle Update{Note}: find post by ap_uri, update content_html (re-sanitize with ammonia), spoiler_text, sensitive, language. Record edited_at timestamp. Emit status.update streaming event to affected local subscribers.

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to capture Update{Note} fixtures from mastodon.social. Spawn a parallel subagent to study the streaming event format.

**Test discipline**:
- Update known post: content_html updated, edited_at set
- Update with new HTML content: ammonia sanitizes independently
- Update unknown post: 200, no error
- Verify streaming event emitted after successful update
All fixtures captured from real servers. Never use implementation as its own oracle. Real in-memory SQLite for DB tests.

**Defensive programming**:
- Verify Update signed by original author
- Re-sanitize content even if it looks clean
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors Result<T, AppError>
- Never log token values or private keys
acceptance_criteria: Update modifies remote_posts content_html; ammonia re-sanitizes; edited_at updated; streaming event emitted; unknown post returns 200; author signature verified
